Act the part. Dress the part. Act the part. Okay. Breathe the part. Look the part. Act like a pro. Be considerate of the gatekeepers position and the purpose they live for. What is that person's job? gatekeeper let me in because I joined the charity. Maybe you need to do an interview with the person. Maybe your interest is not to sell your product, but to interview the person.
